base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_water_edge_autotile — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Water + water-edge autotile — ~12 corner/edge variants for shoreline transitions. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Water + water-edge autotile — ~12 corner/edge variants for shoreline transitions
